params.name: AMS
params.description:
On Jun 15, 2011 AD, the Alpha Magnetic Spectrometer was launched into space by Endeavor to start its detection.
AMS, aka Alpha Magnetic Spectrometer, is a particle physics experiment module that detects dark matter and measures antimatter. Its main component is a massive permanent magnet, and it is made up of several high-precision detectors, such as the star tracker and the Ring imaging Cherenkov detector, to identify the characteristics of the radiation and particles as they pass through an …
